codeReview.summary: Zod was successfully updated to version 4.2.0 across the required packages. The lockfile confirms Zod v3 was fully removed and all instances resolve to v4.3.6. The worker checked for common v3-to-v4 breaking changes (.nonempty(), .strict()) and found none, which was corroborated by passing tests and typechecks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker ran '.factory/init.sh' for setup instead of following the skill's explicit instruction to use 'docker compose -f apps/api/docker-compose.yml up -d' and 'pnpm --filter @emerald/api prisma migrate dev'. It achieved the goal, but deviated from the documented procedure in api-foundation-worker.

summary: Passed code review. Zod v4 migration successfully implemented across the workspace with no breaking changes found. Tests and typecheck pass.
